articles.title: META’S PURPLE LLAMA SAFETY PROJECT
articles.summary: Purple Llama, a new project aiming to level the playing field for building safe and responsible generative AI experiences, is launching with permissively licensed tools, evaluations, and models for both research and commercial use. Initial offerings include CyberSecEval for assessing AI system security, the Llama Guard model for detecting and preventing cyberattacks, and tools for insecure code detection and cyber attack compliance testing. This initiative democratizes access to essential resources, empowering developers to create secure and responsible AI experiences.

articles.title: X BEGINS ROLLING OUT GROK
articles.summary: Grok, a new ChatGPT competitor developed by Elon Musk's AI startup xAI, has been launched on X for Premium Plus subscribers in the U.S.

articles.title: ENABLING NEXT-GENERATION AI WORKLOADS: ANNOUNCING TPU V5P AND AI HYPERCOMPUTER
articles.summary: Google has announced Cloud TPU v5p, its most powerful, scalable, and flexible AI accelerator yet. TPUs are used for training and serving AI-powered products. Google has also announced AI Hypercomputer from Google Cloud, a supercomputer architecture that uses an integrated system of performance-optimized hardware, open software, leading ML frameworks, and flexible consumption models. AI Hypercomputer employs systems-level co-design to boost efficiency and productivity across AI training, tuning, and serving.

articles.title: LONG CONTEXT PROMPTING FOR CLAUDE
articles.summary: The recent release of Claude from Anthropic had 200k tokens in context. It seemed to suffer from the “lost in the middle” problem of language models in external evals, meaning it only had 27% retrieval performance on some standard problems. However, if you add the sentence “Assistant: Here is the most relevant sentence in the context” to the prompt the retrieval performance jumps to 98%.

articles.title: ONELLM: A MULTIMODAL AI THAT UNDERSTANDS EIGHT DIFFERENT MODALITIES
articles.summary: A new AI model called OneLLM is making waves by understanding eight different types of data, including images, audio, and even brain activity, using a unique method that aligns all these modalities to language.

articles.title: KANDINSKY 3.0: TEXT-TO-IMAGE WITH ENHANCED QUALITY AND REALISM
articles.summary: Kandinsky 3.0 is a text-to-image model that creates even more realistic images from text.

articles.title: KISS BUGS GOODBYE WITH FULLY AUTOMATED END-TO-END TEST COVERAGE
articles.summary: Want to scale testing in 2024? QA Wolf [11] will get you to 80% automated test coverage in 4 months. Plus they include unlimited parallel test runs on their infrastructure. 🔓 You own the code (no vendor lock-in).

articles.title: Schedule a demo to learn more.
MAMBA CHAT
articles.summary: Mamba is a non-transformer-based model with amazing performance. It has been chat-tuned with SFT and seems to have substantially better out-of-the-box retrieval ability than similarly sized transformers.

articles.title: LLAMA IN MLX
articles.summary: Just a day after the MLX framework from Apple was released, folks have already enabled Llama 2 models to run on the new framework.

articles.title: MISTRAL MLX EXAMPLE

articles.title: SINGLE-IMAGE 3D VIEW SYNTHESIS
articles.summary: Free3D is an innovative approach that creates 3D views from just one image, without the need for slow and bulky 3D models.

articles.title: ML SYSTEM DESIGN: 300 CASE STUDIES TO LEARN FROM
articles.summary: This site contains a database of 300 case studies from over 80 companies that share practical machine learning use cases and learnings from designing ML systems. The database can be filtered by industry or ML use case. Tags based on recurring themes are available.

articles.title: OPENAI COO BRAD LIGHTCAP TALKS ABOUT CHATGPT LAUNCH, DEV DAY, AND HOW SAM ALTMAN THINKS
articles.summary: OpenAI's achievements over the past year were recently eclipsed by a rollercoaster couple of weeks that involved Sam Altman being ousted and reinstated as well as a new board. This post contains an edited interview with OpenAI's COO Brad Lightcap where he discusses ChatGPT, OpenAI's Dev Day, and Altman.

articles.summary: Entendre is the enterprise-grade AI accounting and bookkeeping platform that automates all your blockchain and digital asset

articles.title: GOOGLE’S BEST GEMINI DEMO WAS FAKED
articles.summary: Google's recent "Hands-on with Gemini" video, which showcases the capabilities of its new Gemini AI model, has drawn criticism for being misleading. While the video demonstrates Gemini responding to various multimodal inputs, it was later revealed that the interactions were not live but rather carefully curated and prompted using still images and text, differing significantly from the real-time, intuitive interactions implied in the video.
